quality.designNotes: Clean Squarespace template; functional but generic. Limited differentiation from competitors.
quality.mobileNotes: Responsive nav with hamburger menu, decent mobile layout.
quality.conversionNotes: No social proof (testimonials/reviews), no trust badges visible on homepage, no response-time promise, no clear process explanation. Primary CTA present but weak context around it.
quality.seoNotes: Title tag present but weak. No visible city pages, no service pages beyond a single /services-1 page, no schema markup indicators, no FAQs, no blog.

structure: Home → Services → About → Contact → Quote nav pattern
seo: Google Business Profile (already active with reviews)

critical: No testimonials / social proof despite having 3 strong Google reviews available
No city-specific landing pages (leaving Google local leads on the table)
important: No trust badges or eco-friendly disposal messaging
Services page is a single catch-all instead of individual service pages

recommendationReason: Existing site is a basic Squarespace template with weak conversion elements and almost no SEO footprint. Client has strong assets (3 glowing Google reviews, Google Ads already running, clear brand voice, extensive service list, eco positioning) that aren't being leveraged. A custom rebuild on the standard localbiz stack will give Torvik city pages, service pages, testimonials, trust signals, and a proper lead-capture hero — all of which directly convert the Google Ads traffic they're already paying for. Domain and email stay; everything else rebuilt.
